The ongoing 2024 Olympic Games have inspired more residents in China to take part in sports. A sports festival has begun in Jinzhong, a city in northern China's Shanxi Province, attracting enthusiastic residents of different ages to get involved. A wide range of competitions have been held, including basketball, tug of war, free combat, judo and boxing.
